_meta.description: Drive disc set registry: 2-piece passive bonuses (auto-applied when >= 2 pieces are equipped) and 4-piece conditional effects (stack count asked at runtime). Add new sets here as data.
_meta.conventions: Stat names and fractions match discs.json, plus 'Combat ATK%': an in-combat ATK buff that MULTIPLIES final (panel) ATK instead of scaling base ATK - measured in-game 2026-07-02 (see DOCS/sources.md). bonus_2pc is unconditional (shows on the in-game stat sheet). bonus_4pc, when present, is a stacking conditional stat: total = per_stack x active stacks (0..max_stacks), asked at runtime; 4 pieces always include the 2-piece bonus too.

bonus_4pc.note: Basic Attack / Dodge Counter / EX Special crits each grant +9% ATK for 6s - one stack per skill type, up to 3 concurrent. Scales PANEL ATK (measured: +300/+599 on a 3330 panel).

BRANCH_SWORD.name: Branch & Sword (Branch & Blade Song)
BRANCH_SWORD.notes: 4-piece exists in-game (CRIT DMG +30% while Anomaly Mastery >= 115; CRIT Rate +12% on squad Freeze/Shatter) but is not modeled yet — only the 2-piece is used for now.
